message:
fix(config,doctor): fix failing test and format string compile error

- network/config.rs: Fix jitter_model_uniform_can_reach_beyond_u64_nanos
  test (logically impossible assertion — u64 RNG caps offset at u64::MAX,
  so jitter samples can never exceed that threshold). Renamed to
  jitter_model_uniform_large_max_does_not_truncate with correct bounds
  assertion. Also includes prior agent's production fix replacing unsafe
  `as u64` casts with duration_from_total_nanos_saturating().

- cli/doctor/mod.rs: Fix format string at L2166 with 5 {} placeholders
  but 6 arguments (record.summary). Added missing 6th {}. Also includes
  prior agents' (NavyHollow, SilentRiver) operator-model contract and
  workspace scanner work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
